channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] SOUTH KOREA → KURSK : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: SOUTH KOREA / KURSK. Location: Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] IRAN → ISRAEL : Violate ceasefire (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Violate ceasefire. Actors: IRAN / ISRAEL. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 20 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] CONGRESSWOMAN → LEBANON : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: CONGRESSWOMAN / LEBANON. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 12 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] HAMAS → GAZA : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: HAMAS / GAZA. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / NAVAL BASE. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: SCHOOL / COMPANIES. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 10 sources.
